use_cases: Displaying dismissible notification messages at the top of a page
Showing alert or warning banners with action buttons
Announcing feature updates or maintenance notices
Rendering icon-based status indicators in a banner layout
Creating multi-layout notification bars with close functionality
ai_summary: A flexible banner component with multiple variants (default, muted, border), sizes, and layout options for displaying notifications, alerts, or announcements. Supports optional icons, action buttons, and close functionality with responsive design for both desktop and mobile platforms.
